nodes.label: Separation of Test Data Stages Principle

edges.rationale: Patient is used within Evaluation interface via patient field
Patient is related to Evaluation which contains TestApplications
ClinicalChecklist is a field in the Evaluation interface
TestApplication has evaluation_id linking to Evaluation
EvaluationDocument has evaluation_id linking to Evaluation
ProgressEntry has evaluation_id linking to Evaluation
Report has evaluation_id linking to Evaluation
Report has sections array of ReportSection
AnamnesisResponse has invite_id linking to AnamnesisInvite
WISC4 is a test type used in evaluations
WISC-IV test results use WISC4Index interface for indices
WISC-IV test results are represented by WISC4Result interface
